pages.text: Since those soul-craving Reapers have already pledged allegiance to you, perhaps that demon that has a special connection with the tombs and forever craves souls might also submit to you. After trying some special methods, a Wight to fight for you was born.
He can teleport instantly in battle to confuse enemies, steal enemy souls to heal himself, summon duplicates and Carrion Maggots to assist in battle — just like when it was an opponent.
Summon a Wight servant through a complex ritual.
Wight servants will faithfully fight for you.
